content: Darkness descends on Tau Ceti IV. Season 2 begins June 2. Featuring a new map with Night Marsh, a new Runner shell Sentinel, the Cradle, new weapons, progression improvements, and more. Purchase Marathon now: Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3065800/Marathon/ PlayStation 5: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marathon/ Xbox Series X|S: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9p8mgmxndv9b Follow Marathon: TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@marathonthegame Instagram: https://instagram.com/marathonthegame Twitter: https://x.com/marathonthegame Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/marathonthegame.bungie.net Discord: https://discord.gg/marathonthegame Infiltrate the dark sci-fi world of Marathon filled with rival players, enemy forces, and unpredictable dangers. Scavenge its maps alone or with a crew, then fight your way to extraction in tense, high-stakes PVP and PVE battles.
chineseContent: 黑暗降临在鲸鱼座钛星四号上。第 2 季于 6 月 2 日开始。包含一张包含 Night Marsh 的新地图、一个新的跑者外壳哨兵、摇篮、新武器、进度改进等等。立即购买 Marathon： Steam：https://store.steampowered.com/app/3065800/Marathon/ PlayStation 5：https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marathon/ Xbox Series X|S：https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9p8mgmxndv9b 关注 Marathon：TikTok：https://tiktok.com/@marathonthegame Instagram： https://instagram.com/marathonthegame Twitter：https://x.com/marathonthegame Bluesky：https://bsky.app/profile/marathonthegame.bungie.net Discord：https://discord.gg/marathonthegame 渗透到 Marathon 的黑暗科幻世界，充满了对手玩家、敌军和不可预测的危险。独自或与团队一起探索地图，然后在紧张、高风险的 PVP 和 PVE 战斗中奋力撤离。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
